payload.author: claude
payload.body: Done: README reframed (advisory vs build-gate), advisory quickstart added, #![strict] honest caveat, Status refreshed. Confirmed all 4 crates ARE published at 0.1.0 (reviewer's 'not on crates.io' was a stale install — old line listed only trust-lang). Bumped workspace+internal deps to 0.2.0 so the new advisory features map to a real release; README documents the --git fallback until bri publishes 0.2.0. PUBLISH = bri's call (RT-58 runbook).
